name: FixRight Home
description: Find and book home service professionals — plumbing, electrical, cleaning, HVAC, handyman, painting, and landscaping. Search available providers, book appointments, reschedule, or cancel.

actions.description: Search for available home service providers by service type, location, urgency, and budget. Returns providers with ratings, pricing, and available time slots.

required_inputs.name: service_type
required_inputs.description: Type of service needed: plumbing, electrical, cleaning, hvac, handyman, painting, or landscaping

required_inputs.name: address
required_inputs.description: Address where the service is needed

actions.description: Book an appointment with a specific service provider at a selected time slot. Creates a confirmed service commitment with a service fee.

required_inputs.name: appointment_time
required_inputs.description: Selected time slot in ISO 8601 format (from provider's available_slots)

required_inputs.name: service_address
required_inputs.description: Address where the service is needed

required_inputs.name: contact_name
required_inputs.description: Name of the person at the service location

required_inputs.name: contact_phone
required_inputs.description: Phone number for the provider to call

required_inputs.name: problem_description
required_inputs.description: Description of the issue to be addressed
required_inputs.example: Kitchen faucet leaking from the base, constant drip

example_response.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before appointment

actions.description: Move an existing appointment to a new time slot. The provider must have availability at the requested time.

required_inputs.name: appointment_id
required_inputs.description: Appointment identifier from the original booking

required_inputs.name: new_appointment_time
required_inputs.description: New desired appointment time in ISO 8601 format

example_response.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before appointment

actions.description: Cancel a booked appointment. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the appointment time. Refund amount depends on timing.

required_inputs.name: appointment_id
required_inputs.description: Appointment identifier from the original booking
